privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introContent: AI In Action ("we", "us", or "our") operates the aiinaction.top website (the "Service"). This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website and use our services.
privacy.collectAccountContent: When you sign in via GitHub OAuth, we receive your GitHub username, display name, email address, and profile avatar. We do not access your private repositories or GitHub credentials.
privacy.collectUsageContent: We automatically collect information about how you interact with our Service, including challenge completions, project submissions, comments, and likes. This data is used to track your progress, calculate XP rankings, and improve the platform experience.
privacy.collectCookiesContent: We use essential cookies to maintain your login session and locale preferences. We do not use third-party tracking cookies or advertising trackers.
privacy.useContent1: Authenticate your identity and maintain your account
privacy.useContent2: Track challenge progress, XP, streaks, and achievements
privacy.useContent3: Display your profile, projects, and contributions to the community
privacy.useContent4: Send transactional emails (e.g., welcome email upon registration)
privacy.shareContent: We do not sell your personal information. Your public profile (username, avatar, completed challenges, shared projects) is visible to other users. We may share anonymized, aggregated data for analytics purposes. We may disclose information if required by law or to protect our rights.
privacy.securityContent: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data. API keys are stored as hashed values. All data is transmitted over HTTPS. However, no method of electronic transmission is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.retentionContent: We retain your account data for as long as your account is active. You may request deletion of your account by contacting us. Upon deletion, your personal data will be removed, though anonymized contributions (comments, project entries) may remain.
privacy.rightsContent: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You may update your profile information at any time. To request data deletion, please contact us at the email below.
privacy.childrenContent: Our Service is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us.
privacy.changesContent: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new policy on this page with an updated date.
privacy.contactContent: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:
